name: Blueberry Coffeecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the first 2 ingredients together.
2. Add eggs to the mixture.
3. Sift flour, baking powder, and salt together, then add alternately with milk.
4. Stir in blueberries.
5. Spread batter into a well-buttered 9x12-inch pan. Blend the last 4 ingredients, then sprinkle on top.
6. Bake at 375 degrees for 25 to 30 minutes.
Frozen berries may be used. Be sure to rinse and pat dry before blending them into the batter or the juice will turn the batter blue. Most of a 12 oz. bag makes 2 cups.
